name: chen-friedman
description: Open-source AI agent skills for legal professionals. Currently ships mapping-legal-cases; more legal skills on the roadmap.

plugins.name: legal-skills
plugins.description: Maps a folder of legal case documents into 10 cross-referenced analysis files. Extracts text from PDFs, Word, emails, spreadsheets, images, audio, and video — across 8 languages (English, Hebrew, Arabic, Russian, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese).
plugins.author: Chen Friedman
